archetype_selected.name: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) + Retro-Futurism
archetype_selected.reasoning: For a highly technical IT infrastructure dashboard monitoring Proxmox, Synology, QNAP, and Veeam, the interface must prioritize uncompromised data density and scannability. A 'Control Room' / dark terminal aesthetic builds trust and authority. Color is used strictly functionally—monochrome base with high-saturation status indicators.

layout_and_spacing.padding_scale: p-4, p-6 for nested containers. Strict internal padding to prevent collision.
layout_and_spacing.surface_strategy: Grid Borders: Expose the skeleton. Heavy use of border-collapse style layouts with sharp 1px border-zinc-800. No soft shadows. Use geometric, structured spacing.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-align all data and labels for quick reading. Use JetBrains Mono for numbers to align decimals/digits perfectly.

components.button: Primary: bg-white text-black hover:bg-zinc-200. Secondary: border border-zinc-800 bg-transparent text-white hover:bg-zinc-900. Sharp edges (rounded-sm).
components.card: border border-zinc-800 bg-zinc-950 p-6 rounded-md. Hover: border-zinc-700 transition-colors.
components.table: Dense data table for backups. border-b border-zinc-800. Strip Vercel-look defaults. Use monospace for status columns, sizes, and timestamps.
components.badge: Sharp edges (rounded-sm). 1px border. Colored based on status (success/warning/error).
components.input: bg-black border border-zinc-800 text-white focus:ring-1 focus:ring-white transition-all.

motion.hover: Explicit text colors on hover. Subtle -translate-y-[1px] on actionable cards.

media.icon_weight: Duotone for active/accent, Regular for general UI.

images.description: Dark data center. Use with heavy bg-black/80 overlay to serve as the immersive background for the 'Autentificare' (Login) screen.
Abstract neon lines. Mask with gradient and use at 10% opacity inside the empty states or high-level statistics cards.

accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button', data-testid='filter-proxmox-btn', data-testid='nav-dashboard').
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text against black/zinc-950 meets minimum 4.5:1 ratio.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Shadcn UI for core components (Table, Select, Dialog, Card, Form) but strip the default rounded-lg radii. Override with rounded-sm for a sharper, technical feel.
Implement the Romanian language explicitly across all UI text using the provided translation map.
Login Page: Use the 'Login Background' image. Create a Glassmorphism card (backdrop-blur-xl bg-zinc-950/60 border border-white/10) for the login form.
Dashboard Layout: Use a dense 'Control Room' grid. Place High-level Stats at the top, followed by a filterable Data Table for backups, and an Alerts Panel on the side (or as a drawer).
Data Presentation: Use JetBrains Mono for ALL technical data (IPs, Backup Sizes, Timestamps, Status Badges).
Platform Filter: Create toggle buttons for Proxmox, Synology, QNAP, Veeam. Use monochrome when inactive, text-white bg-zinc-800 when active.
Charts: Use Shadcn Charts (Recharts) to visualize Backup History Timeline. Format the charts with dark gridlines (stroke='#27272a') and monochrome bars, using color ONLY for failed/warning states.
Ensure 'Office 365' settings form exists within 'Setări Email', including inputs for Client ID, Tenant ID, and Secret (mocked functionality).
